title: tragacantha turkestana
intro: Tragacantha turkestana, also known as Astragalus tauricolum, is a perennial plant species native to Central Asia, belonging to the legume family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha turkestana include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and improve cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by making a tea or infusion from its roots and flowers, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
